<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

<!--
==
* Yin Water Goat (癸未) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

-->
==Years of Yin Water Goat==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}}.

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of 癸未'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|23|en|23|WD=Q216232|lt=23|1=23}}
* {{ill|83|en|83|WD=Q2818490|lt=83|1=83}}
* {{ill|143|en|143|WD=Q396679|lt=143|1=143}}
* {{ill|203|en|203|WD=Q24767|lt=203|1=203}}
* {{ill|263|en|263|WD=Q32194|lt=263|1=263}}
* {{ill|323|en|323|WD=Q32836|lt=323|1=323}}
* {{ill|383|en|383|WD=Q561492|lt=383|1=383}}
* {{ill|443|en|443|WD=Q32650|lt=443|1=443}}
* {{ill|503|en|503|WD=Q30975|lt=503|1=503}}
* {{ill|563|en|563|WD=Q33782|lt=563|1=563}}
* {{ill|623|en|623|WD=Q31044|lt=623|1=623}}
* {{ill|683|en|683|WD=Q33496|lt=683|1=683}}
* {{ill|743|en|743|WD=Q23604|lt=743|1=743}}
* {{ill|803|en|803|WD=Q30388|lt=803|1=803}}
* {{ill|863|en|863|WD=Q25052|lt=863|1=863}}
* {{ill|923|en|923|WD=Q30108|lt=923|1=923}}
* {{ill|983|en|983|WD=Q23934|lt=983|1=983}}
|
* {{ill|1043|en|1043|WD=Q19348|lt=1043|1=1043}}
* {{ill|1103|en|1103|WD=Q12487|lt=1103|1=1103}}
* {{ill|1163|en|1163|WD=Q19672|lt=1163|1=1163}}
* {{ill|1223|en|1223|WD=Q5399|lt=1223|1=1223}}
* {{ill|1283|en|1283|WD=Q5543|lt=1283|1=1283}}
* {{ill|1343|en|1343|WD=Q6072|lt=1343|1=1343}}
* {{ill|1403|en|1403|WD=Q6117|lt=1403|1=1403}}
* {{ill|1463|en|1463|WD=Q6549|lt=1463|1=1463}}
* {{ill|1523|en|1523|WD=Q6302|lt=1523|1=1523}}
* {{ill|1583|en|1583|WD=Q6726|lt=1583|1=1583}}
* {{ill|1643|en|1643|WD=Q6917|lt=1643|1=1643}}
* {{ill|1703|en|1703|WD=Q6822|lt=1703|1=1703}}
* {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763|1=1763}}
* {{ill|1823|en|1823|WD=Q6988|lt=1823|1=1823}}
* {{ill|1883|en|1883|WD=Q7816|lt=1883|1=1883}}
* {{ill|1943|en|1943|WD=Q18623|lt=1943|1=1943}}
|
* {{ill|2003|en|2003|WD=Q1986|lt=2003|1=2003}}
* {{ill|2063|en|2063|WD=Q1044976|lt=2063|1=2063}}
* {{ill|2123|en|2123|WD=Q19698012|lt=2123|1=2123}}
* [[:en:2183|2183]]
* [[:en:2243|2243]]
* [[:en:2303|2303]]
* [[:en:2363|2363]]
* [[:en:2423|2423]]
* [[:en:2483|2483]]
* [[2543]]
* [[2603]]
* [[2663]]
* [[2723]]
* [[2783]]
* [[2843]]
* [[:en:2903|2903]]
* [[:en:2963|2963]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

== Related Articles ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Goat|qq=ja|癸未|version=84123771|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Kui-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Wasser-Ziegenevi]]
[[de:Yin Water Goat]]

[[ja:癸未]]
[[zh:癸未]]
[[ko:계미]]
[[fr:Chèvre de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schaf]]
[[fr:Ch%C3%A8vre d%27eau]]
[[zh:%E7%99%B8%E6%9C%AA]]

[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]]
[[de:Wasser-Ziegeneen]]
[[en:Water Goat]]
[[fr:Chèvre de eauboishak]]
[[it:Kui-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Quý Mùi]]
[[za:Gueiceij]]
[[ar:Yin Water Goat]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Water Goat--><!--Yin Water Goat-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gŭi-ê]]
[[fr:Chèvre d'eau]]
[[hak:Kui-vi]]
[[nds:Water-Schaap]]
[[za:Gveiqmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gŭi-ê]]
[[fr:Chèvre d'eau]]
[[hak:Kui-vi]]
[[nds:Water-Schaap]]
[[za:Gveiqmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]]
[[zh-yue:癸未]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062599}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
